testcase.name: test_declined_card_maps_to_user_error

failure.message: expected HTTP 402 but got HTTP 500 from payment gateway adapter

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected status 402, got 500 request_id=req-41a6d3e0 gateway=stripe sandbox profile=declined-card left: PaymentDeclined right: InternalServerError

testcase.name: test_idempotency_key_reuse

failure.message: duplicate capture created for existing idempotency key

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected one capture event but found two rows in payment_capture_events customer_id=cus_100021 payment_intent=pi_898234 idempotency_key=checkout-20260513-2230

testcase.name: test_invoice_total_includes_tax
testcase.failure: Decimal('126.90') != Decimal('129.44') after applying tax region CA-ON and promotion SPRING-15
